# 🌟 Vozz Rich Electronic Press Kit (EPK) 🌟  

🎶 **Stage Name:** Vozz Rich  
🎧 **Genres:** Electronic, House, Dance  
🌍 **Based In:** United States  
📧 **Email:** vozzrich@gmail.com  
📞 **Phone:** 310-989-8178  

---

## 🎛️ **Artist Overview & Sound Design**  
Vozz Rich is a US-based producer and DJ with roots in Mexico and California. His music is a unique fusion of Detroit house, techno, salsa, and big-room vibes, crafted to ignite dance floors and captivate listeners. His sound design is characterized by:  
- 🔊 Deep, pulsating basslines  
- 🎹 Dynamic synth layers  
- 🌟 Infectious grooves that blend underground rave energy with mainstream appeal  

---

## 🎵 **Notable Releases & Collaborations**  
Vozz Rich has an impressive discography, including:  
- **“Breathless”** (with L25) – A smooth, yet electrifying house track  
- **“Don’t Want It to End”** – Featuring remixes by Kicevski, Pillars, and PYM  
- **“Prendelo”** – A Latin-infused dance anthem with an extended mix and remix by Gabriel Robella  
- **“Butterflies” Remix** (Artsychoke) – A vibrant, reimagined dance floor hit  
- **“Get Up On The Floor”** (with Franz Kolo) – A high-energy house track  

🔗 **Stream on:**  
- [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/artist/27sSKrytmUXukDnMGPXNHQ)  
- [Apple Music](https://music.apple.com/us/artist/vozz-rich/1675984686)  
- [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/vozzrich)  

---

## 📊 **Streaming & Engagement Metrics**  
- **Spotify Followers:** 4,109  
- **Instagram Followers:** 4,875  
- **Recent Spotify Streams:** Over **24,000 monthly listeners** (peaking at **37,780 streams** in November 2024)  
- **Last.fm Listeners:** Steady growth, reaching **729 listeners** in January 2025

- Exclusive remixes for major labels  
- Tour dates to be announced soon 🔥

## 💡 **Why Work With Vozz Rich?**  
- Proven track record of consistent streaming growth  
- Unique sound that bridges cultures and genres  
- Strong engagement across social platforms  
- Passion for creating dance-floor anthems that resonate globally
